textByHash.14fc38ea7b131bcd8ffc882d4d56b772b5e7fa77: This here is Weiss. Trolls built it years ago, after we got kicked out from caves further south. Now Weiss is our home.
textByHash.2512b2482d675a4a030847a82dcc75be3c752267: Boulder not sure exactly what you offering, human, but it not sound like something Boulder want to happen.
textByHash.3065c595947ef3d908561f20eee765a9788ab940: Boulder gotta grow goutweed for tribe, an' also make sure your herbs stay healthy. Snowflake's husband troll very strict on it.
textByHash.5723f04b39aaece338077b4c3d7980729c855ba1: Eh, it kinda rough, but it getting better. Snowflake, she taught us goutweed farming. Goat, wolf, human all taste so much nicer with goutweed in.
textByHash.7e0537a798ff4116912ddb9e5a17ecdb952340ac: So yeah, Weiss is good place to live, now Snowflake in charge. All trolls like Snowflake. Her husband troll kinda weird, but that not our problem.
textByHash.81632da9c4d5256a1504ee283a222a8598fcbdc9: Maybe next time you come, Boulder get ear-plugs.
textByHash.821bfdfdd4c93c5ad027e622ab19523afd5e2add: We met at entry gate, remember? Boulder sent you away, 'cos we not trust humans here in Weiss, an' also you sound crazy. But you our friend now, an' you always welcome.
textByHash.8a6de203fbe70cf29199734bb2d8115455cad82b: What you want, human? You not coming in. Weiss is troll town - humans not welcome.
textByHash.a73d1c861be37224862f7fc99deb19669bc691d3: We mortal beings - troll, human, goat - we are our bodies, and our bodies are us. You human got dumb ideas 'bout mind/body dualism.
textByHash.aaade45b8b2ee123bcd73a44c22a8f39457a942e: Anyway, Boulder not here to talk ontological distinction between mind an' matter, especially with dumb human who not know what his arm is. So push off.
textByHash.b4d915d229faafcce98117b791203a66dcc35610: Boulder still not sure what you offering, human, but you definitely not doing it in here. Go away!
textByHash.cb41fa054df99e4b35f0a39c120fd419b4719802: Human arm might taste good, maybe, so if Wolfbone sent your arm as snack, we happy to take it an' eat it.
textByHash.d4283c1fc5503911b0cfc3419d1f761112bdcddb: Human sound confused about how body work. See, mortal body is intrinsic part of mortal being. It not like we got our souls floating up in da sky controlling bodies like puppets.
textByHash.d80b9257a9ddbb62adb0988b92f729fbb1f250a7: Urgh - human arm attached to human body with human mouth what keep talking an' talking. Shut up an' go away.
textByHash.e5e10a2669f653ba19304a51b1564fb5410332d1: Boulder used to guard entry gate, but now Snowflake trusted Boulder with important farming job. Much more fun.
textByHash.f308e442830a4eda0a2f26b6f77fb4a7ce6a76c6: It great here, now Snowflake an' her husband troll taught us goutweed farming. Food so much better now.
